title: IC RegFin Legal, CMS INDUSLAW, Trilegal act on Hyugalife ₹100 crore Series A fundraise
description: Pratech Brands Private Limited, the parent company of Hyugalife, has raised $10.6 million (~₹100 crore) from a Series A fundraise led by IvyCap Ventures Fund III, with participation from First Bridge India Growth Fund.IC RegFin Legal advised Pratech Brands on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Puneet Shah (Senior Partner), Sidharth Dhody (Partner) and Abhishek Singh (Senior Associate).Puneet Shah, Sidharth DhodyCMS IndusLaw advised lead investor IvyCap Ventures on this fundraise.Tr
